---
description: "Resume the repository state from current-truth docs without reading full history by default."
name: "Session Resume"
argument-hint: "resume | start | continue"
agent: "Reasoning Engineer"
model: "GPT 5.5"
---

Run the `/session-resume` contract from `docs/WORKFLOW_HELPERS.md` and `.github/skills/session-resume/SKILL.md`.

Read `docs/repo_state/ACTIVE_STATE.md` and `docs/repo_state/PROVEN_KNOWLEDGE.md` first. Keep the summary under 20 lines and state which deeper context was intentionally skipped.
